EZK.45.25.gloss: and according to the meat offering
EZK.45.25.definition: a donation; euphemistically, tribute; specifically a sacrificial offering (usually bloodless and voluntary)
grease, especially liquid (as from the olive, often perfumed); figuratively, richness
